name: playground-svelte-bundle-size
description: Demonstrates the bundle-size impact of the svelte v4 → v5 upgrade and the recovery from adding a 'sideEffects' field to svelte's package.json.

scripts.install:all: cd packages/test-svelte-v4 && pnpm install && cd ../test-svelte-v5 && pnpm install && cd ../test-svelte-v5-patched && pnpm install
scripts.build:all: cd packages/test-svelte-v4 && pnpm build && cd ../test-svelte-v5 && pnpm build && cd ../test-svelte-v5-patched && pnpm build
